event_info: a direct hit at the bowler's end; but Salt was scrambling and he beats the throw with ease; was the inswinger and he pushed it in front of mid-on
half-a-shout for LBW; but the ball was swinging and would've probably swung down leg; looked high as well. Nipped back in and Virat Kohli played all around the line

beautifully played; the magical wrists of Kohli in play here - the inswinger and he spotted it early; leans across and the whips it over square leg; sails over the ropes for the first six of the night
Boult keeps it full and at the stumps - Kohli comes down the pitch and drags a thick inside edge; behind square on the on-side for a single
clattered; short of a good length and just outside off - Salt backs away; opens up the off-side and then hammers the cut past cover
Boult shortens the length outside off - tad too close and Salt chops it to the left of cover-point for a single
short of a good length and well wide of off; Salt is early into the pull and toe-ends it to mid-off
uppish and safe; fuller length delivery on off - Salt shuffled across and then chipped it in the air; in the gap wide of mid-on ad he's back for the second
drilled; too full and too wide from Hardik; Salt leans across into the drive and finds the gap wide of cover; runs away to the ropes in a hurry
full and down leg; past Salt's whip and it's called as a wide
on a good length and just outside off - Salt presses across and pokes it to the left of cover; off for a quick single
tad fuller and wider of off; Kohli lunges forward and plays the push-drive to mid-off
Hardik drags the length back as Kohli came down the pitch; dropped wide of cover-point for a single
thumped; Kohli comes down the pitch; makes room and then lifts it effortlessly over mid-off - almost went all the way; bouncing right in front of the ropes
Boult shortens the length around off; Kohli makes room and stabs it to the off-side for a single
short of a length and at the stumps - Salt shuffles across on the pull and is struck high on the thigh-pad
smashed; back of a length and at the stumps - Salt picks the length early; swivels across and then hammers the pull over square leg for a maximum
low full-toss outside off - Salt went hard on the slog and dragged a thick inside edge to mid-wicket
the bouncer from Boult; high and past Salt's pull; through to the keeper. He's looking for a wide; but it's deemed as a fair delivery
full-toss from Bumrah as he saw Kohli coming down the pitch; past the whip and strikes him high on the pad
top-edge and four; the slower short ball from Bumrah - Kohli waits and waits; then goes hard on the cut; gets a fat top-edge that flies over Boult at short third
a big shout for LBW; but this was heading down leg; fuller length delivery on the pads and Kohli was beaten on the flick; came off the inside edge before crashing into the pad
another slower short ball outside off - Salt gets on top of the bounce and then swats it wide of mid-wicket; back for the second
yorker length delivery on middle and leg; squeezed in front of mid-on for a quick single
yorker length delivery outside the leg-stump - Kohli plays with an open face and slices it to backward point's right; a slight misfield and they're back for the second
clubbed; dragged short by Santner; down leg and Salt rocks back on the pull; gets enough for the ball to fall over the ropes
massive; tad too full now - Salt gets his left leg out of the way and then swipes it high and over wide long-on; went deep into the 2nd tier for a 89m hit
make it three in a row; Santner drags the length back; but it sits up for the right-hander - Salt spots the length; rocks back and hammers it over square leg for a maximum
Santner is bleeding boundaries at the moment - Santner goes slower and wider of off; Salt gets down low and then drags the sweep past mid-on; beats the man in the ring and runs away
very full and down leg - Salt plays the standing sweep and picks out short fine
slower and wider of off; makes Salt wait and he mistimes the drive to cover - 22 off the over
low full-toss and Kohli miscues the drive to mid-on - Philip Salt was backing up for a quick single and has to rush back - a direct hit by Santner; but Salt is quick and he's back
on a length and angling into the right-hander - Kohli swings and gets a thick inside edge; behind square on the on-side for a single
back of a length and on off; Salt stays leg-sided and runs it to short third
fuller length delivery on the pads; flicked behind square on the on-side - Tilak runs to his right in the deep and keeps them down to a couple
the slower bouncer; but it loops over Salt's head and is called as a wide
the slower cutter from Bumrah - Salt backs away and inside edges it towards mid-on; off for a quick single
full-toss down leg; whipped down to long leg for a single - 71 off RCB's batting PP
slower and wider of off; slapped straight to the fielder at cover
loopy delivery wide of off; driven into the gap wide of cover for a single
full-toss from Santner; driven down to long-off for a single
Santner slows down the pace and throws one wider of off - has Kohli reaching out on the cut and he's beaten on the outside edge

Kohli gets lucky; Santner slows down the pace and drifts one wider of off; made Kohli reach out on the drive and the inside edge nearly bounced back onto the off-stump - goes off Ryan Rickelton's pads and rolls to the on-side
slower and wider of off - punched square on the off-side for a single
crunched; fraction short and at the stumps - Salt swivels across; picks the length early and then thumps the pull over mid-wicket; brings up a 25-ball half-century
back-to-back boundaries for Salt - flatter and wider plunges forward off; Salt stays back and then cuts it late; beats backward point to his right and runs away to the ropes
make that 3 in a row; tossed up well wide of off and Salt bludgeoned the back-foot drive; to the left of cover and the balls ped away despite the fielder getting a hand onto it
hammered; that's bounced down off the 2nd tier - fraction short and at the stumps; ghe swivels across and then pulls it high over square leg. RCB and Salt on the move
the wrong 'un from Markande; spins into the pads and it's nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
Markande tosses one well outside off - swiped through mid-wicket for a single; 20 off the over
low full-toss outside off;l Kohli drive and mistimes it to cover
flighted delivery outside off - Kohli slugs across the line and the ball nearly carried to long-on - on the bounce to the fielder
fraction short and wide of off; cut away to deep cover for a single
lovely; tossed up on middle and leg - Kohli gets close to the ball and thyen brings his wrists into play on the drive; ram-rod straight and the ball races away

tossed up slower and drifting away from outside off; Kohli thinks it's past the tramline and lets it go. Not called and a bemused Kohli reviews. Didn't look like a wide to the naked eye and there's a good portion of the ball inside the guideline; fair delivery and RCB have lost a review

slogged; close to deep mid-wicket; but the ball was always bouncing wide of Dhir at wide mid-wicket - tossed up slower and wider of off; Kohli brought the bottom-hand on the slog-sweep; in the air and wide of the fielder who threw himself to his left in the deep
fuller length delivery wide of off - Salt plays with an open face and runs it backward of square on the off-side; needed a sliding effort from Markande to prevent the boundary
slower short ball outside off - Salt swings across the line and missed; barely carried through to the keeper
poor ball and Salt doesn't miss out; full-toss on the pads and it's nonchalantly pulled over long leg for a maximum

a half-chance; but Boult can only get to the ball on the half-volley - ran in from the deep; slid forward; but the ball was always dropping in front of him. Was a full ball and Salt went hard on the drive; sliced it high and over cover

Philip Salt puts in the dive and that might've have saved him; was looking for the second and then has to rush back. Dives and beats the throw - was a half-arm jab towards mid-on and the fielder was quick on the ball. Tilak Verma; the throw is good; but not good enough to run Philip Salt out
low full-toss outside off - Salt drives and can't beat cover
the wide yorker from Shardul; but it's past the tramlines and has been wided
full and way wide of off; would've been a wide had Kohli let it go - but it went chasing after that and mistimes it to the off-side
Shardul goes full and wide of off; past Kohli's chasing blade; but it's past ther tramlines as well; called as a wide
much better from Shardul; the wide yorker; past the tramline; but Kohli had moved across and is beaten
full-toss outside off; drilled back at the bowler's end - the ball defelcts off the stumps and slows down; giving long-off the chance to cut it off
full-toss outside off - Kohli doesn't get hold of the shovel and the ball plugs in the outfield; just a single

ball_event: out Caught by Hardik Pandya!! The pressure was building and it's Shardul with the wicket - kept it very full and wide of off
event_info: Salt shuffled across on the drive; but he can't get completely under it - no elevation on the shot and he holes out to Hardik at extra-cover - end of a fine hand from Philip Salt though. Phil Salt c Hardik Pandya b Shardul Thakur 78(36) [4s-6 6s-6]
cracking shot; overpitchd and Patidar is off in some style - mid-off was inside the cicle - mid-off was inside the circle and he gets enough elevation on the drive to clear the fielder
tossed up on middle; Virat Kohli comes down the pitch and drives it to long-on for a single
massive; Rajat Patidar has come out with clear intent - tossed up and sliding into the pads; Patidar gets his left leg out of the way and then shovelled it high into the stands at wide long-on
monstrous; tad too full from Markande - Patidar prods across; gets under the ball and then hoists it high and deep into the stands at backward square leg. he's off and racing away
make that three in a row - Patidar is toying with Markande here. Was tossed up slower and widr of off; Patidar bends down low; reverses the stance and then sweeps it over backward point for a maximum
full-toss and Patidar has missed out; drives it straight to the fielder at cover-point
low full-toss and driven down to long-off for a single
fuller length delivery outside off - Patidar shuffles across on the paddle and missed; past the tramline and has been wided; but had Patidar moved across? MI don't review though
too easy for Patidar at the moment - full-toss from Shardul and Patidar swipes it on front of square on the on-side; beats the fielder in the deep
Shardul goes for the wide yorker andf spills it miles outside off - called as a wide
the slower short ball outside off; past Patidar's swipe and it's called as a wide. MI look bewildered; but they don't review again

Patidar is dealing in sixes at the moment - fuller length delivery and well wide of off; the RCB skipper saw the width and went hard on the drive; sliced it off the outer half; high and over backward point for a maximum
Shardul is looking frazzled; attempts the slower short ball; but it's too short and too high; called as a wide
a wide full-toss; Patidar reaches out and toe-ends it down to long-off
fuller length delivery outside off - driven square on the off-side and Kohli is back for the second run
hammered; full-toss outside off and it's drilled back past the bowler. Sheer power and the ball races away to the long-off boundary
full and wide of off - Kohli reaches out and carves it in front of square on the off-side. A sliding effort from Santner to keep them down to a couple. 23 off the over
50-run stand up! A juicy full toss around off; Rajat Patidar stands tall and thumps it over mid-off. He's raced away to 38 off 10 balls
goes short on off; it's a slower bouncer and it sails over the batter; Rajat Patidar looks to play the upper cut; misses
stand and deliver! This has been an impeccable knock by the RCB captain. Was pitched up by the bowler and Rajat Patidar stood tall to smoke it over long-off for half-a-dozen
yorker length delivery at the stumps; Rajat Patidar squeezes it into the off-side for a single
a full toss; but all Kohli manages it a single at long-off
full and quick around leg; Rajat Patidar swings early; gets an inside edge towards the on-side
fires a wide ball down the leg-side
pitched up by the bowler around middle and leg; Virat Kohli drives it towards long-on for a single. 16 runs from the over
that's a fair delivery; another review lost! Was a short ball down the leg-side and Virat Kohli missed out on his pull. The third umpire reckons it wasn't a wide

fifty off 37 balls. Virat Kohli whips this through square leg for a single. Gets a gentle round of applause from his teammates. His strike-rate hasn't been upto the mark; so he himself isn't celebrating the milestone
looks to hack across the line; gets an inside edge onto the thigh. A single taken

ball_event: out Caught by Suryakumar Yadav!! Hardik gets a wicket off a full toss. Was a full toss and Virat Kohli tried to take the aerial route. The bat turns in his hands as he doesn't middle it. And SKY stationed at long-on takes a safe catch to draw curtains to Kohli's handy contribution. With more than 5 overs remaining
event_info: RCB have quite a few big-hitters to follow next. Virat Kohli c Suryakumar Yadav b Hardik Pandya 50(38) [4s-5 6s-1]
short of a length outside off; shaping into the batter; Tim David slices it into the off-side to open his account
back of a length around off; punched into the pocket at covers for a single
on the fuller side; Rajat Patidar drives it through the off-side for a single
tad fuller around off; Tim David drives it through mid-off for one

fifty off 17 balls! Fraction short outside off; Rajat Patidar slashes hard away from his body and the outside edge races away to the third man fence. Had there been a slip in place; this would have been a chance

fires it down the leg-side; that's a wide ball given by the umpire. Mumbai Indians have challenged the umpire's decision though. The batsman had a moved a touch while the bowler delivered it; and the third umpire reckons it was a fair delivery
way too wide outside off; clear wide ball this time around
way too full as Rajat Patidar drills it straight back to the bowler

ball_event: out Caught by Tilak Varma!! End of a fantastic knock by Rajat Patidar. This was on the fuller side
event_info: Rajat Patidar brings his bat down in a jiffy and lofts it straight to Tilak at long-on. Taken comfortably by the fielder and the RCB captain walks back to a standing ovation from his teammates. The set batsmen are gone in successive overs. Two relatively new batters at the crease. Kohli was visibly upset; threw his gloves and then his helmet as he went back to the dug-out. Rajat Patidar c Tilak Varma b Mitchell Santner 53(20) [4s-4 6s-5]
low full toss on middle and leg; Tim David drives it to long-on for one
Jitesh Sharma doesn't waste any time. He gets going in style. Makes slight room and drives it uppishly through extra cover to open his account
a slower bouncer attempted by Jasprit Bumrah outside off; Jitesh Sharma swings early and misses
yorker at the stumps; Jitesh Sharma squeezes it back to Jasprit Bumrah
200 up for RCB! Full toss on leg; Jitesh Sharma flicks it through square leg for a single
on a length around off; Tim David steers it through the off-side for a single

perfect start to the over. Short ball outside off; Tim David slaps it over covers for a boundary. Hardik Pandya is down on his knee; looks like he is in some pain. The physio walks out immediately to check on him. He's feeling dizzy; the Mumbai heat taking a toll on him. We'll have a slight delay due to the same. SKY; Rohit and Hardik have a discussion

that's a big full toss! Well above the batter's waist outside off; Tim David has a swing and a miss. Free-hit coming up! Mumbai Indians review it; but the replays confirm it was above his waist comfortably. The onfield decision stays

that has gone the distance! A juicy full toss on leg; Tim David stays put and smokes it over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. No need to run for those; everyone - including the batter and bowler - simply admire that ball as it sails into the stands
Hardik Pandya goes short outside off; Tim David goes for a pull; gets an inside edge past the stumps
that's a fantastic stop by Naman Dhir at deep mid-wicket; charges across to his right and puts in a dive to flick the ball away. Saves a couple of runs
full and wide outside off; Jitesh Sharma advances down the wicket; tries to slice it away and misses
yorker length ball at the stumps; Jitesh Sharma squeezes it through wide mid-on for a couple of runs
1 run; full and quick around leg; Tim David gets cramped for room as he tries to whip this away. Gets hit on the pads and they take a leg bye
full toss by Jasprit Bumrah; but that was quick. Jitesh Sharma drives it towards mid-off for one
straight as an arrow! Jasprit Bumrah goes full; tad slow; Tim David stays put and smashes it right over the bowler's head for a boundary. Couldn't have placed it any straighter
flicked away! Drifting on the pads; Tim David flicks it over deep backward square leg for a maximum. Jasprit Bumrah proving to be ineffective against the Australian batter
fired down the leg-side; Tim David tries to flick it away; but misses. He wanted a wide; but RCB don't have any reviews left
perfect scenario for RCB. Tim David will retain strike for the 20th over. This was a yorker length ball as Tim David squeezed it to long-on
fired on leg; Tim David flicks it towards wide long-on for one

ball_event: out Lbw!! That's plumb. A yorker length ball by Trent Boult and Jitesh Sharma shuffles across in the crease to whip it across the line. Gets hit on the shoe by the slower one and up goes the umpire's finger. Romario Shepherd walks out to bat with 4 balls to go.. Jitesh Sharma lbw b Trent Boult 10(9) [4s-1]
event_info: out Lbw!! That's plumb. A yorker length ball by Trent Boult and Jitesh Sharma shuffles across in the crease to whip it across the line. Gets hit on the shoe by the slower one and up goes the umpire's finger. Romario Shepherd walks out to bat with 4 balls to go.. Jitesh Sharma lbw b Trent Boult 10(9) [4s-1]
way too full around off; squeezed past the bowler for a single by Romario Shepherd
proving to be an excellent 20th over by Trent Boult. On the fuller side around off; Tim David advances down the wicket and ends up squeezing this towards long-off
another fantastic delivery; doesn't allow the batter to get underneath it; Romario Shepherd whips it through square leg

RCB finish with a massive total of 240/4! A juicy full toss on leg; Tim David stays put and clubs it over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. Hardik Pandya appreciates that too. The RCB camp looks satisfied as they have done half the job
pitched up by the bowler around off; Ryan Rickelton drives it towards mid-off
pitched up by the bowler outside off; shaping away from the batter; Ryan Rickelton goes for a drive and misses. Almost nicked that
Ryan Rickelton is off the mark with a maximum! A good length delivery by Jacob Duffy; Ryan Rickelton picks the length early and swings it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen
fraction short outside off; punched to the fielder at cover by Ryan Rickelton
on the shorter side outside off; angled away from the batter; Ryan Rickelton has a swing and a miss
10 runs from the opening over. Back of a length outside off; Ryan Rickelton times his punch through covers as the ball races away to the boundary
Bhuvneshwar Kumar starts off with a wide ball down the leg-side
yorker length ball on middle and leg; Rohit Sharma digs it towards mid-wicket
tad short on middle and leg; Rohit Sharma drags it through square leg for one; Salt in the deep stops it with a slide
touch fuller on off; Ryan Rickelton drives it to wide mid-off for one
back of a length around middle and leg; Rohit Sharma knocks it to long-on for one
flicked away! Drifting on the pads; Ryan Rickelton flicks it over deep backward square leg. Easy pickings for the southpaw
a quick single taken to end the over. Ryan Rickelton drives it towards mid-off and scampers across to the other end. A shy at the bowler's end by the fielder; but it doesn't hit

Ryan Rickelton dealing in boundaries. This was a short ball on leg; Ryan Rickelton swivel-pulls this towards the deep backward square leg boundary. This was a slower one and Ryan Rickelton made sure to smash it away
slight width on offer outside off; slapped towards cover by Ryan Rickelton
short and punished! Ryan Rickelton rocks back and pumps it over deep mid-wicket for a flat six. Rickelton looking in fantastic form; ominous signs for RCB
slower length delivery around middle and leg; nudged to mid-on by Ryan Rickelton for one
Rohit Sharma joins the act. He advances down the wicket and smokes the length delivery over deep mid-wicket. Runs coming thick and fast. This is exactly the need of the hour for MI
fraction short outside off; punched through the off-side for a single
just clears mid-on. Takes the aerial route; lofts it and just manages to clear Shepherd at mid-on who was moving across to his left. Wasn't middled but had enough elevation to elude the fielder
slower ball outside off; Rohit Sharma goes for a cut; mistimes it towards the off-side
low full toss on the pads; Rohit Sharma flicks it over backward square leg for a single
slower one by Rasikh Salam Dar; back-of-the-hand as Ryan Rickelton gets beaten due to the lack of pace
yorker length ball at the stumps; Ryan Rickelton squeezes it back to the pacer

that's a boundary to end the over. It's a full toss outside off and Ryan Rickelton drills it through wide mid-off for four runs. Was proving to be an excellent over until that last ball. Least expensive over of the powerplay nevertheless
flatter through the air around middle and leg; nudged back to the bowler by Rohit Sharma
wide yorker by Krunal Pandya as Rohit Sharma squeezes it towards long-off for a single
50 up for MI as Ryan Rickelton pulls this short ball through square leg
1 run; fired on leg; Rohit Sharma moves away to play it; but gets cramped fo room. Off the pads towards short fine leg
slingy action by Krunal Pandya; Ryan Rickelton works it through the on-side

just like the previous over; even this one ends with a boundary. This was way too full outside off and Rohit Sharma sliced it over the infield at cover-point. Krunal Pandya had bowled so well until that final ball. Even this wasn't a poor delivery; just that Rohit Sharma played it pretty well
slower delivery around off; pushed to mid-off for a single by Ryan Rickelton
good length delivery around middle and leg; Rohit Sharma clips it towards mid-wicket
good length delivery outside off; slapped to mid-off where the fielder stops it by moving across to his right
Suryakumar is off the mark. This was a full toss as MI's number 3 gets going with a well-executed on-drive
slower back of a length delivery outside off; slapped to mid-off by Suryakumar Yadav
full toss on leg; driven along the carpet to long-on

tossed up full and drifting in outside the leg-stump; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward to flick between deep mid-wicket and long-on; Padikkal runs across and cuts it off with a dive; did well to keep his feet away from the cushions
drift and into leg-stump; good length; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward and nudges it down to long-on
tossed up full on off; Ryan Rickelton gets forward to swipe; is not to the pitch of the ball; but gets it away via a thick inside half; wide of Bhuvi's dive at backward square-leg
full on off; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward to drive and it's in the air but well wide of Krunal Pandya to his left
1 run; fired down leg; Ryan Rickelton sweeps and misses; off the pad for a legbye
sliding down leg; good length and Suryakumar Yadav sinks low and sweeps; it's in the air and wide of deep backward square-leg; one bounce over the ropes

ball_event: out Caught by Bhuvneshwar Kumar!! Straight up and caught at short third man. The googly and it's tossed up full outside off
event_info: spins away; Ryan Rickelton tries the slogsweep and the top-edge goes straight up. Shouts of RCB echo around the Wankhede. Ryan Rickelton c Bhuvneshwar Kumar b Suyash Sharma 37(22) [4s-3 6s-3]
good length outside the leg-stump; Tilak Varma gets forward and nudges it back to Suyash Sharma
good length and flat on middle; Tilak Varma goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep mid-wicket; is off the mark
flat good length on off; Suryakumar Yadav goes on the back foot and whips it to wide long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Jacob Duffy!! Swept straight to the fielder at short fine. It's a nothing delivery
event_info: full and down leg; Tilak Varma sweeps and doesn't keep it down. Easy catch and there's stunned silence around the Wankhede with the RCB supporters jumping up and down. Tilak Varma c Jacob Duffy b Suyash Sharma 1(3)

into the top-tier. It's a half-volley outside off and even though the line is well outside; Hardik Pandya doesn't miss out. He gets forward and smashes the loft. First ball and he doesn't care. Suyash can only stare helplessly at Pandya
tossed up full on off; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward to drive wide of sweeper cover and Romario fumbles to give one more
full on off; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward to drive to long-off
full on off; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward to drive to long-off

bad review that. Impact is ump's call and it's missing leg-stump easily. This is a quicker delivery and full; down leg; Suryakumar Yadav sinks low to sweep and misses. Rapped on the pad. But RCB waste it as Krunal Pandya was the one who was interested
round-arm and very low arm; full just outside off; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward to drive to sweeper cover
hello! Hello! No love lost between the brothers. A bouncer from Krunal Pandya and Hardik Pandya sinks low to leave. Collected by Jitesh Sharma. A staring match ensues. This is spicy stuff
full outside off; Suryakumar Yadav gets low and sweeps; the top-edge goes to the fine-leg region. Salt runs and tries to cut it off; but the ball touches the cushions

consecutive fours. It's a flat delivery outside off; Suryakumar Yadav goes on the back foot and cuts; beats the dive of backward point; Romario the fielder and Suyash Sharma not happy with him. Makes his displeasure known
flat good length and skids on; Suryakumar Yadav mistimes the cut to backward point
good length and into the pitch outside off; Suryakumar Yadav flat-bats but mistimes it to down to long-on

superb cut. It's a good length delivery outside off; Hardik Pandya stays back; cuts late and with so much power and wrists. Races wide of backward point. Third four of the over. Hardik with an ice-cold stare back at Suyash Sharma
fired full on leg-stump; Hardik Pandya was winding up for the big hit; but it's too full and he gets forward to drive to long-on
swatted away. It's a short of length delivery and sliding down leg; Hardik Pandya helps the swat and gets it fine; wide of short fine
low full-toss outside off; Hardik Pandya gets forward and opens the face of the bat to drive; picks out backward point
this is a half-volley. And Hardik Pandya is in the mood tonight. He gets forward and lofts straight down the ground. Doesn't try to overhit; Suryakumar Yadav gives the thumbs up
he has missed a a juicy low full-toss outside off; Hardik Pandya grimaces. It's there and Pandya gets forward to drive and misses; Jitesh Sharma does well to stopb
full just outside off; Hardik Pandya gets forward to drive and extra-cover can't cut it off despite a dive; easy single
was a wide outside off; had Suryakumar Yadav left that. But he reaches for it; the wide short of length delivery outside off; SKY cuts and the toe-end runs down to short third man
short outside off; Hardik Pandya tries to pull across the line; the thick outside-edge runs away fine; wide of short third man; tried to hit that too hard
tossed up full outside off; Hardik Pandya with a massive mow across the line; misses
flat good length on off; Hardik gets forward and heaves to wide long-on. Again tried to hit it too hard and mistimed it
flat good length on off; Suryakumar Yadav goes on the back foot and pulls wide of deep mid-wicket; easy two

what acrobatics and theatrics from Hardik Pandya. The crowd love it. He was down; trying to protect his wicket as Suyash Sharma tried to deflect it on the stumps. Then stays down; with the bowler worried; and lo and behold - he springs up like a gymnast and is on his feet. Draws a huge cheer from the crowd. The ball was full on the stumps; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward and drives it back; was an easy single as Suyash deflected it to long-on
the last ball goes for four. Was a wide length delivery outside off; Suryakumar Yadav gets forward and cuts well; races away to the deep extra-cover fence. The fielder was wide
well wide outside off; left alone and wide taken
short of length outside off; Hardik Pandya goes on the back foot and cuts; but mistimes it to sweeper cover

ball_event: out Caught by Rasikh Salam Dar!! Krunal Pandya bows in celebration. Calm and composed. Nothing extravagant. It's tossed up full on leg-stump
event_info: Suryakumar Yadav goes for his favorite sweep; but straight to the fielder at deep backward square-leg. Simple catch. And again chants of RCB echo around the stadium. Suryakumar Yadav c Rasikh Salam Dar b Krunal Pandya 33(22) [4s-5]
flat good length on off; Sherfane Rutherford goes on the back foot and cuts to sweeper cover; to get off the mark
the round-arm from Krunal Pandya. Flat and fullish outside off; Hardik Pandya gets forward and opens the face of the bat to drive to sweeper cover
another bouncer and Sherfane Rutherford is surprised; looks to cut the outside off delivery and misses; good take by Jitesh Sharma
round-arm and low arm; Sherfane Rutherford loses his shape; and the bottom-hand; tries to slug it; miscues it down to long-on
tossed up full outside off; the googly; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to heave; mistimes it to deep mid-wicket

Krunal can't catch that at long-on. It's tossed up and Hardik Pandya gets forward to belt the loft; Krunal runs across and over-runs it; is hit hard on the left wrist; the ball touches the cushions. Was a good effort but not good enough
flat good length outside off; Hardik Pandya gets forward and flat-bats it so hard but straight to the fielder at long-off
that's what Sherfane Rutherford can do. It's a length delivery on middle; Rutherford sinks low; the slogsweep and it's into the first-tier at deep square-leg
flat good length and the leg-break comes in; Sherfane Rutherford goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-off
flat good length on middle; Hardik Pandya gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket and retains the strike with that run
the slower-ball and well wide outside off; left alone and wide taken
full outside off; Hardik Pandya gets forward and lofts; slices across it; Salt does so well; runs across and cuts it off at long-off to his left; keeps it to two

the slower-ball and short of length outside off; Hardik Pandya goes on the back foot and then adjusts to to tap the ball on its head; beats the dive of Romario at backward point; to his left. Well-played
short outside off; Hardik Pandya gets across and cuts; misses; wanted to upper-cut that

ball_event: out Caught by Romario Shepherd!! Caught at deep backward point. Hardik Pandya lost all shape and looked ugly when he connected that. Was well wide outside off
event_info: full; he slogs and the thick outside-edge flies to Romario who has safe hands. Krunal and the others are elated as they celebrate. Meanwhile sullen and disappointed faces in the MI camp. Hardik Pandya c Romario Shepherd b Jacob Duffy 40(22) [4s-6 6s-1]
slower-ball and short of length outside off; Naman Dhir goes on the back foot and slashes; but on the bounce to sweeper cover
full and down leg; was a wide; Sherfane Rutherford though flicks to the deep square-leg region and retains the strike with that run

Rasikh Salam Dar is again down. He is in trouble. He is calling for help. Cramps again. A slower-ball and into the surface outside off; sits up and Sherfane Rutherford has mowed this miles over deep mid-wicket
low full-toss on off; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to drive to long-off. Again Rasikh Salam Dar holding his left leg

ball_event: out Caught by Rajat Patidar!! Hard length and Rasikh Salam Dar gets the wicket. It's short of length and just outside off
event_info: Naman Dhir is rushed as he tries to mow across the line; the ball flies off the outer half and a simple catch to extra-cover. The task gets harder for MI. Naman Dhir c Rajat Patidar b Rasikh Salam Dar 1(2)
slower-ball on a length on middle; Mitchell Santner gets forward to push to cover for an easy single
good yorker length delivery outside off; Sherfane Rutherford fails to squeeze it out. A dot

Guyanese gets Guyanese. But wait. It's a front foot no-ball. And a good catch too. All that doesn't matter. Full on leg-stump; Sherfane Rutherford flicks and the top-edge goes straight up. Was a tough catch but Romario Shepherd went after that and took it near mid-wicket with both hands. Then the celebrations are muted as the buzzer goes off signalling a no-ball
the free-hit is a catch but it won't count. It's full outside the leg-stump; Sherfane Rutherford flicks too early; the leading-edge is caught by cover running forward
full on leg-stump; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward and drives wide of long-on for two
full and right up there on the stumps; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to drive to long-on
good batting. It's short on the stumps; Mitchell Santner makes room slightly; cuts up and over backward point. Got the elevation to clear the man
short and off-pace on the stumps; Mitchell Santner goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket. Just one
full on the stumps; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to drive to long-on. These singles won't hurt RCB
short and angling away from the left-hander; Mitchell Santner looks to upper-cut and misses; a dot to end
a wide down leg; Sherfane Rutherford heaves and misses

short of length and angling away from the left-hander outside off; Sherfane Rutherford slashes and misses; called a wide. Patidar checks with Jacob Duffy and reviews. It's inside the wide guideline and Virender Sharma has to change his call. Good review that. Jitesh Sharma wasn't too sure as was Duffy
low full-toss on middle; Sherfane Rutherford does well; stays low and gets forward to heave; has the legs to go over the wide long-on fence. A flat hit
Jacob Duffy round the wicket. Good off-pace and short of length outside off; Sherfane Rutherford slashes and misses. A dot
a juicy low full-toss and outside off; Sherfane Rutherford won't miss out on such stuff. He gets forward and powers it way back over long-on. Much more distance than the last one
off-pace and short of length outside off; Sherfane Rutherford slashes and misses; RCB review as it's given as a wide; this is wide of the guideline; so RCB will lose it

pacy short delivery and Sherfane Rutherford loses the review. He goes on the back foot to pull and misses; his head is 1.87m measured; the ball went at 1.8m. So called as one short delivery for the over
way outside off; the slower-ball and the off-cutter; Sherfane Rutherford tries to cut and can't reach it
too predictable. It's the off-pace short of length delivery and into the pitch; Sherfane Rutherford waits and pulls flat over deep mid-wicket. All the way. Ends the over well
full and down leg; Mitchell Santner flicks and misses
full on leg-stump; Mitchell Santner gets forward and clears his front leg to drive to long-off
a juicy low full-toss on the pads; easy for Sherfane Rutherford who flicks and finds the deep backward square-leg fence. Short fine was inside
superb yorker length delivery on the front pad; Sherfane Rutherford flicks and misses; impact outside the leg-stump. And RCB know it
very full on the stumps; Sherfane Rutherford jams it down to long-on. Just one
full on leg-stump; Mitchell Santner clears his front leg and flicks to long-on
full and outside the leg-stump; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to flick to mid-wicket and they take a quick single to Rajat; who fails to pick it up cleanly

Romario Shepherd escapes by the narrowest of margins. A waist-high full-toss and Sherfane Rutherford has swung this flat over deep backward square-leg. All the way. He then reviews and his waist is measured at 1m and this ball has passed him at 0.97m
this is a slower-ball and the off-cutter; well wide outside off; Sherfane Rutherford can't reach it and it's a wide
good slower-ball and the short of length delivery outside off; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to mow across the line and misses; no reviews left and this looked inside the guideline
this has gone way back at deep square-leg. A slower-ball off-cutter and short of length; sits up; Sherfane Rutherford goes on the back foot and nails the pull; way back into the stands
full outside off; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to drive to extra-cover who slides to his left to cut it off
way outside off; the yorker length delivery gone wrong. Left alone and another wide
a juicy low full-toss outside off; Sherfane Rutherford gets forward and sinks low; he lofts so well; the ball flies over sweeper cover. Sweet timing. But little too late for MI

a half-volley and it's a six to end. RCB though have won by 18 runs. It's in the slot and Sherfane Rutherford gets forward to loft so well; flies way back over long-on. Didn't hold back at all. But it's RCB who are all smiles
